name: Mahmoud and Ehab and the function
statement:
Dr. Evil is interested in math and functions, so he gave Mahmoud and Ehab array a of length n and array b of length m. He introduced a function f(j) which is defined for integers j, which satisfy 0вЂ‰в‰¤вЂ‰jвЂ‰в‰¤вЂ‰mвЂ‰-вЂ‰n. Suppose, ciвЂ‰=вЂ‰aiвЂ‰-вЂ‰biвЂ‰+вЂ‰j. Then f(j)вЂ‰=вЂ‰|c1вЂ‰-вЂ‰c2вЂ‰+вЂ‰c3вЂ‰-вЂ‰c4... cn|. More formally, .
Dr. Evil wants Mahmoud and Ehab to calculate the minimum value of this function over all valid j. They found it a bit easy, so Dr. Evil made their task harder. He will give them q update queries. During each update they should add an integer xi to all elements in a in range [li;ri] i.e. they should add xi to ali,вЂ‰aliвЂ‰+вЂ‰1,вЂ‰... ,вЂ‰ari and then they should calculate the minimum value of f(j) for all valid j.
Please help Mahmoud and Ehab.
input:
The first line contains three integers n,вЂ‰m and q (1вЂ‰в‰¤вЂ‰nвЂ‰в‰¤вЂ‰mвЂ‰в‰¤вЂ‰105, 1вЂ‰в‰¤вЂ‰qвЂ‰в‰¤вЂ‰105)В вЂ” number of elements in a, number of elements in b and number of queries, respectively.
The second line contains n integers a1,вЂ‰a2,вЂ‰...,вЂ‰an. (вЂ‰-вЂ‰109вЂ‰в‰¤вЂ‰aiвЂ‰в‰¤вЂ‰109)В вЂ” elements of a.
The third line contains m integers b1,вЂ‰b2,вЂ‰...,вЂ‰bm. (вЂ‰-вЂ‰109вЂ‰в‰¤вЂ‰biвЂ‰в‰¤вЂ‰109)В вЂ” elements of b.
Then q lines follow describing the queries. Each of them contains three integers li ri xi (1вЂ‰в‰¤вЂ‰liвЂ‰в‰¤вЂ‰riвЂ‰в‰¤вЂ‰n, вЂ‰-вЂ‰109вЂ‰в‰¤вЂ‰xвЂ‰в‰¤вЂ‰109)В вЂ” range to be updated and added value.
output:
The first line should contain the minimum value of the function f before any update.
Then output q lines, the i-th of them should contain the minimum value of the function f after performing the i-th update .
note:
For the first example before any updates it's optimal to choose jвЂ‰=вЂ‰0, f(0)вЂ‰=вЂ‰|(1вЂ‰-вЂ‰1)вЂ‰-вЂ‰(2вЂ‰-вЂ‰2)вЂ‰+вЂ‰(3вЂ‰-вЂ‰3)вЂ‰-вЂ‰(4вЂ‰-вЂ‰4)вЂ‰+вЂ‰(5вЂ‰-вЂ‰5)|вЂ‰=вЂ‰|0|вЂ‰=вЂ‰0.
After the first update a becomes {11,вЂ‰2,вЂ‰3,вЂ‰4,вЂ‰5} and it's optimal to choose jвЂ‰=вЂ‰1, f(1)вЂ‰=вЂ‰|(11вЂ‰-вЂ‰2)вЂ‰-вЂ‰(2вЂ‰-вЂ‰3)вЂ‰+вЂ‰(3вЂ‰-вЂ‰4)вЂ‰-вЂ‰(4вЂ‰-вЂ‰5)вЂ‰+вЂ‰(5вЂ‰-вЂ‰6)вЂ‰=вЂ‰|9|вЂ‰=вЂ‰9.
After the second update a becomes {2,вЂ‰2,вЂ‰3,вЂ‰4,вЂ‰5} and it's optimal to choose jвЂ‰=вЂ‰1, f(1)вЂ‰=вЂ‰|(2вЂ‰-вЂ‰2)вЂ‰-вЂ‰(2вЂ‰-вЂ‰3)вЂ‰+вЂ‰(3вЂ‰-вЂ‰4)вЂ‰-вЂ‰(4вЂ‰-вЂ‰5)вЂ‰+вЂ‰(5вЂ‰-вЂ‰6)|вЂ‰=вЂ‰|0|вЂ‰=вЂ‰0.
After the third update a becomes {1,вЂ‰1,вЂ‰2,вЂ‰3,вЂ‰4} and it's optimal to choose jвЂ‰=вЂ‰0, f(0)вЂ‰=вЂ‰|(1вЂ‰-вЂ‰1)вЂ‰-вЂ‰(1вЂ‰-вЂ‰2)вЂ‰+вЂ‰(2вЂ‰-вЂ‰3)вЂ‰-вЂ‰(3вЂ‰-вЂ‰4)вЂ‰+вЂ‰(4вЂ‰-вЂ‰5)|вЂ‰=вЂ‰|0|вЂ‰=вЂ‰0.
